topic: A boy finds a dragon egg in the forest and hides it from everyone

core_concepts: bond between boy and dragon egg
timeline_beats: boy discovers dragon egg in forest
boy hides egg from family and villagers
egg begins to show signs of hatching
boy faces challenges to keep egg safe
dragon hatches and boy forms bond

clip_structure.clip_1: Introduction to the boy and discovery of the dragon egg in the forest
clip_structure.clip_2: The boy hides the egg and faces challenges keeping it secret
clip_structure.clip_3: The dragon egg hatches and the boy bonds with the baby dragon
